title: leucopogon neurophyllus
intro: Leucopogon neurophyllus, also known as Mountain Pepper, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leucopogon neurophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Leucopogon neurophyllus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a culinary herb to add flavor to dishes.
